tenantBoundary.description: The tenant is derived from the authenticated Identity session and forwarded server-to-server by DSH. Browser query, path, and header values cannot select the WLT tenant.

invariants: Self-service representative finance uses the actor and tenant resolved from the bearer session.
Control-panel representative finance uses the operator tenant resolved from the bearer session.
DSH forwards X-Tenant-ID only from trusted Identity context.
WLT rejects representative wallet and ledger reads without X-Tenant-ID.
No frontend can override actorId, actorType, or tenantId for a self-service financial read.
WLT remains the sole owner of wallet balance and ledger truth.
negativeEvidence: cross-tenant wallet hidden as not found
DSH and frontend balance mutation absent
